original_image_tags: Black-and-white photograph of a disc-shaped aircraft with a central fuselage and a vertical tail fin, appearing to be a model or prototype. The aircraft has a U.S. military star insignia visible on the side.
Black-and-white photograph of a long, thin, delta-wing aircraft model mounted on a support in a wind tunnel environment.

elements.description: One silver-colored flying saucer aircraft model with U.S. military star insignia on top, four jet exhaust plumes, and landing gear visible. Captioned 'DISK-LIKE NAVY FLOUNDER PROJECT WAS DROPPED'. Photo credit 'U.S. Navy'.

One dark, slender, wingless aircraft model inside a wind tunnel, mounted on a support structure. Captioned 'MOCK-UP OF EARLY MODEL IS TESTED IN WIND TUNNEL... latest models are circular, faster, more maneuverable'. Photo credit 'NACA photo'.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree on two photographs (flying saucer model with star insignia, and a wind tunnel model) and their general categories, but Description B adds specific caption text and visual details (exhaust plumes, landing gear) not mentioned in A, with no direct contradiction on quoted text.
